task: Fix Discord webhook prompt not appearing on fresh clone when no .env file exists
discussion_summary: User's friend cloned the repo fresh, ran `askr init`, entered their name, but the Discord webhook URL prompt never appeared despite no .env file being present. Root cause identified: an `except Exception: pass` block was swallowing an import error that occurred before the prompt code could execute. The prompt logic was inside the try block, so any early exception prevented it from running. Fix: move the Discord webhook prompt outside the try-except so it always runs after the name prompt, regardless of import errors.

accomplishments.what: Identified root cause: except Exception: pass swallowing errors before prompt execution
Moved Discord webhook prompt outside try-except block in askr.py
Committed fix: 'fix: move Discord webhook prompt outside try-except'

in_progress.what: Discord webhook prompt logic moved outside exception handler to guarantee execution on fresh installs

next_actions.action: Have friend pull latest changes and run `askr init` again to verify webhook prompt now appears after name entry
next_actions.why: Confirm the fix works on a fresh clone with no .env file

next_actions.action: Verify that if friend presses enter to skip webhook prompt, no Discord send error occurs (should bail early gracefully)
next_actions.why: Earlier fix added early exit if no webhook configured, but needs validation

next_actions.action: Regenerate Discord webhook URL on Discord server and document in README that exposed URLs must be rotated
next_actions.why: Original webhook URL was exposed in chat and is now invalid

next_actions.action: Test clean install flow end-to-end: fresh clone → askr init → name prompt → webhook prompt → successful init
next_actions.why: Ensure the complete onboarding path works without hidden errors

decisions.decision: Move prompt logic outside try-except rather than add nested try-except inside
decisions.reason: Cleaner, more maintainable, and ensures prompts always execute regardless of import errors

decisions.decision: Keep early exit in send_message if no webhook configured rather than force prompt retry
decisions.reason: User can skip webhook setup; system should gracefully degrade rather than fail

failed_approaches.approach: Assuming getpass() was the issue (hiding input visibly)
failed_approaches.reason: Distraction; real issue was exception handler swallowing errors before prompt code ran

failed_approaches.approach: Checking if env.load() was picking up stale .env from parent directories
failed_approaches.reason: User confirmed fresh clone with no .env file present; issue was earlier in execution flow

relational_files.why: Discord webhook URL loaded from .env; stale URL was blocking fresh installs

blockers: Discord webhook URL was exposed in chat and regenerated; friend needs new URL in .env to test Discord notifications
